title: Elegant Thai Melon Roast
description: A caramelized, brine-dry roasted melon dish infused with Thai flavors, perfect for a low-carb festive dinner.
instructions: Preheat oven to 200°C and line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
Cut the cantaloupe into 1-inch cubes, rinse, and pat dry with paper towels.
Whisk together coconut oil, fish sauce, lime juice, chili flakes, soy sauce, garlic powder, ginger, and cilantro in a small bowl.
Toss the melon cubes in the sauce until uniformly coated.
Spread the coated cubes in a single layer on the prepared baking sheet.
Roast for 15-18 minutes, turning halfway through, until the edges caramelize.
Remove from oven, let rest 5 minutes, then serve garnished with extra cilantro if desired.
